title: rosa elymaitica var. albicans
intro: Rosa elymaitica var. albicans, also known as White Rose of Aswan, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Rosa elymaitica plant, native to the Middle East and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa elymaitica var. albicans include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and PMS. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often blended with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
